name: sendsprint-explainer-video
description: Remotion-based animated explainer for the SendSprint Claude Code skill.

scripts.start: npm run build:css && remotion studio src/index.ts
scripts.build: npm run build:css && remotion render src/index.ts SendSprintExplainer out/sendsprint-explainer.mp4
scripts.build:promo: npm run build:css && remotion render src/index.ts SendSprintLaunchPromo out/sendsprint-launch-promo-pt.mp4 && remotion render src/index.ts SendSprintLaunchPromoEN out/sendsprint-launch-promo-en.mp4
scripts.build:promo:preview: npm run build:css && remotion render src/index.ts SendSprintLaunchPromo preview/sendsprint-launch-promo-pt.mp4 && remotion render src/index.ts SendSprintLaunchPromoEN preview/sendsprint-launch-promo-en.mp4
scripts.build:explainers: npm run build:css && remotion render src/index.ts SendSprintExplainer preview/sendsprint-explainer.mp4 && remotion render src/index.ts SendSprintExplainerEN preview/sendsprint-explainer-en.mp4
scripts.build:before-after: npm run build:css && remotion render src/index.ts SendSprintBeforeAfter out/sendsprint-before-after-pt.mp4 && remotion render src/index.ts SendSprintBeforeAfterEN out/sendsprint-before-after-en.mp4
scripts.build:before-after:preview: npm run build:css && remotion render src/index.ts SendSprintBeforeAfter preview/sendsprint-before-after-pt.mp4 && remotion render src/index.ts SendSprintBeforeAfterEN preview/sendsprint-before-after-en.mp4
scripts.build:runloop: npm run build:css && remotion render src/index.ts SendSprintRunLoop preview/runloop.mp4 && remotion render src/index.ts SendSprintRunLoopEN preview/runloop-en.mp4
scripts.build:preview: npm run audio && npm run build:promo:preview && npm run build:before-after:preview && npm run build:runloop && npm run build:explainers
scripts.still:before-after: npm run build:css && remotion still src/index.ts SendSprintBeforeAfter out/sendsprint-before-after-poster-pt.png --frame=90 && remotion still src/index.ts SendSprintBeforeAfterEN out/sendsprint-before-after-poster-en.png --frame=90
scripts.still:promo: npm run build:css && remotion still src/index.ts SendSprintLaunchPromo out/sendsprint-launch-promo-poster-pt.png --frame=110 && remotion still src/index.ts SendSprintLaunchPromoEN out/sendsprint-launch-promo-poster-en.png --frame=110
scripts.build:webm: npm run build:css && remotion render src/index.ts SendSprintExplainer out/sendsprint-explainer.webm --codec=vp9
scripts.still: npm run build:css && remotion still src/index.ts SendSprintExplainer out/poster.png --frame=60
